settings.tagline: The nap upgrade they didn't know they needed.
settings.material_body: We designed this bed around the way pets actually sleep — curled tight, fully stretched out, or somewhere in between. High-density foam supports joints and holds its shape. Plush microfibre keeps them warm. The washable cover keeps you sane.

settings.title: Product Details
settings.value_4: Dogs and cats — all breeds, all sizes

settings.title: Bed Size Guide
settings.hint: Measure your pet nose-to-tail when sleeping curled. Choose next size up.
settings.table_html:
Bed sizeDimensionsBest for
Small50×40cmCats, small dogs under 5kg
Medium70×55cmDogs 5–15kg, most cats
Large90×70cmDogs 15–30kg

settings.title: Shipping & Returns
settings.content:
Free worldwide shipping on all orders. Express available at checkout.

Free 30-day returns on all non-personalised items. Items must be unworn and in original packaging.

settings.title: Wash & Care
settings.content:
Cover: Zip off and machine wash cold, gentle cycle. Tumble dry low or air dry.

Inner: Spot clean only — do not machine wash the foam insert. Air regularly.

settings.name: High-Density Foam
settings.description: Supports joints and holds its shape wash after wash. Especially valuable for senior pets and larger breeds.

settings.name: Washable Cover
settings.description: Zip-off cover goes straight in the machine. Because beds get dirty. That's allowed.

settings.name: Non-Slip Base
settings.description: Silicone dot base grips hard floors and tiles. No sliding, no bumping into walls.

settings.text: I've never seen my dog get this excited. The quality feels incredible — super durable and looks beautiful. It's rare to find pet products that are both functional and this stylish. PAWD nailed it.
settings.author: Olivia M.

settings.text: The personalised collar is the prettiest I've ever seen. The stitching, the softness, the engraving — all of it feels so intentional. Worth every cent and more.
settings.author: Jack L.
